options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: single_lap_mode
options.description:
Races only have a single lap. This makes the game significantly harder, 
especially on weak kart combos.

This overrides Lap Count setting

options.name: lap_count
options.description: Modifies the amount of laps in a race, has no effect if single lap mode is on.

options.name: disable_cpu_items
options.description:
Prevents CPUs from using items for a less chaotic experience.

Has no effect if Item Mania is enabled.

options.name: item_mania
options.description:
CPUs will always get 3 copies of items they get from item boxes. CPU items can't be
disabled if this option is selected.

!!!WARNING!!! This makes the game significantly harder and more frustrating to play,
not for the faint of heart

options.name: springs_only
options.description: Item boxes can only give springs. This makes puzzle piece hunting a lot easier.

options.name: goal
options.description:
Determines what your goal is to consider the game beaten.

- Grand Prix: Get first place in every grand prix cup
- Races: Get first place in every race
- Time Trials: Gain medals in all time trials (READ BELOW)
- Puzzle Piece Hunt: Collect puzzle pieces

Note on time trials: Although the game generates, please check for mod support
before enabling this option, and beware that not all time trials may be
beatable with the current logic and you could get stuck.

options.name: cc_requirement
options.description:
Sets the CC requirement for the Grand Prix and Races goals. Other ccs may still 
give checks depending on other options.

If the goal is not Grand Prix or Races, this option does nothing.

options.name: time_trial_goal_grade
options.description:
Sets the minimum medal grade required for the Time Trials goal
!!!IMPORTANT!!! Platinum medals require certain kart combinations to be 
reasonably achievable. These aren't implemented in logic yet, so randomizing
kart loadouts may lead to impossible games.

If the goal is not Time Trials, this option does nothing.

options.name: randomize_races
options.description:
Sets how to shuffle race unlocks into the item pool

- Cups: Grand Prix cup unlocks are shuffled into the item pool, races unlock when you unlock their cup
- Races: Race unlocks are shuffled into the item pool, cups unlock when you've unlocked all races in the cup
- Cups and Races: Race and cup unlocks are shuffled into the item pool, playing a cup requires all 4 races and the cup item

Note: "Cups and Races" is incompatible with Progressive Cups - if both are enabled,
Progressive Cups will be automatically disabled.

options.name: progressive_cups
options.description:
Starts the game with the first cup onlocked, then unlocks them in order
every time a "Cup Unlock" item is found.
Turning this off unlocks cups in random order with their specific items.

This option does nothing if cups aren't randomized.

Note: This option is automatically disabled if Randomize Races is set to "Cups and Races".

options.name: randomize_puzzle_pieces
options.description:
Adds puzzle pieces to the item pool.

Always on when the goal is Puzzle Piece Hunt

options.name: puzzle_piece_count
options.description:
Sets the amount of puzzle pieces added to the item pool. If the goal is Puzzle Piece Hunt, 
this is the amount of puzzle pieces required to beat the game. 

If puzzle pieces aren't randomized, this option does nothing.

options.name: randomize_characters
options.description: Adds characters to the item pool, and adds a location for winning a race as each character.

options.name: randomize_karts
options.description: Adds karts to the item pool, and adds a location for winning a race with each kart.

options.name: randomize_hats
options.description:
Adds hats to the item pool

- Off: Hats are unlocked in their vanilla locations
- Progressive: Always unlock bronze hats first, then silver, then gold
- Combine Tiers: Unlocking a hat instantly unlocks bronze, silver, and gold

options.name: randomize_spoilers
options.description:
Adds spoilers to the item pool

- Off: Spoilers are unlocked in their vanilla locations
- Progressive: Always unlock bronze spoilers first, then silver, then gold
- Combine Tiers: Unlocking a spoiler instantly unlocks bronze, silver, and gold

options.name: stat_randomizer
options.description:
Randomizes the top speed, acceleration, and handling for Karts and/or Characters

- Off: Karts and characters use their default values
- Karts: Randomizes kart stats, not characters
- Characters: Randomizes character stats, not karts
- Both: Randomizes stats for both karts and characters.

options.name: random_stat_values
options.description:
Choose how high you want randomized stats to be. Note that these are just
averages and outliers may still happen, they're just less likely.

- Low: Stats are generally much lower than the base game
- Medium: Stats are generally around the same as the base game
- High: Stats are generally much higher than the base game

options.name: randomize_items
options.description:
Randomizes the items that can be received from item boxes and adds locations for
acquiring each item from an item box for the first time.
Always starts with one item unlocked.

Incompatible with springs only.

options.name: lap_sanity
options.description:
Adds checks for finishing a lap in first place, adding anywhere between 1 and 10
filler items to the pool per race, for a total of 16 to 160 extra locations

options.name: death_link
options.description: Enables Death Link.
